title: Robinhood (HOOD) Stock Investors Activity & Sentiment - Perplexity Finance
text: Comprehensive market data and investor sentiment summary for Robinhood Markets stock. Stock Overview: Nasdaq ticker HOOD representing Robinhood Markets, Inc. Market cap fluctuating between $25-35B depending on recent trading. Shares outstanding approximately 905M. Trading Activity: Volume spikes around earnings announcements. Short interest levels reflect investor skepticism post-Q1 miss. Retail investor participation remains active. Options market activity brisk reflecting investor positioning. Analyst Coverage: 23 analysts following the stock with mostly positive ratings. Coverage spread across major investment banks. Increased analyst commentary around regulatory changes. Valuation Multiples: Forward P/E around 35-38x (elevated but justified by growth). Price-to-Sales around 15-17x on 2026 revenue. EV/EBITDA in line with high-growth fintech peers. Key Metrics: Return on equity strong despite recent earnings miss. Asset quality high with minimal charge-offs. Capital adequacy strong. Earnings Power: EPS expected to exceed $2.19 in 2026 based on consensus. Earnings surprise pattern shows mixed results (beat 2024, miss Q1 2026). Guidance track record reasonable but crypto adds volatility. Market Sentiment: Mixed sentiment reflecting near-term concerns and longer-term optimism.
